english: Step Back to Ride the Tiger
visual: Steps back into an empty stance with one hand raised above the head and the other lowered beside the hip, body turned at an angle.
motion_description: The person steps backward with the left foot, shifting the body's weight onto the left leg and leaving the right foot resting lightly on its toes in an empty stance. As the weight shifts, the torso rotates slightly to the right, and the arms move in opposite directions in a slow, continuous flow. The right arm sweeps upward, finishing with the hand positioned above eye level, while the left arm pushes downward to rest near the left hip.
